briefs.title: Solar panel racking systems and foundations now exempt from BC school taxes
briefs.summary: Effective December 31, 2025, BC's new School Tax Exemptions (Solar Power Projects) Regulation removes school taxes (a provincial property-related tax) from the racking systems that hold solar panels and their foundations. This applies to any solar power project using photovoltaic (sunlight-to-electricity) panels across British Columbia.
briefs.action_required: If you own a solar power project in BC, confirm with your tax adviser that your racking and foundation assets are classified as exempt starting Dec 31.

key_dates.label: BC School Tax Exemption for solar panel racking and foundations takes effect
